projectDescription: An online art gallery and marketplace connecting global artists with collectors, offering original artworks across painting, sculpture, digital art, and more — with virtual and physical exhibitions.
keyFeatures: Browse and buy original artworks across 7 categories: painting, drawing, mixed media, printmaking, sculpture, digital, and photography
Advanced filtering by style, medium, subject, material, color, orientation, size, and price
Artist profiles with verified artwork listings and follower system
Virtual exhibition builder — artists can create and publish immersive online exhibitions
Physical gallery exhibitions held in Bhaktapur, Nepal with QR-code-based hidden art reveal
Secure payments via Khalti (Nepal), Stripe, and credit/debit cards
Shipping handled by Annapurna Art specialists — artists only need to package
Supplier dashboard for artists to manage portfolio, track orders, and monitor sales
Featured artist program with curator-selected spotlights
publicApiSurface: Art browse at /category/{id}/{name} with filters: style, medium, subject, material, color, orientation, size, price
